sourceSummary.oneLine: Preprocessed BLUE BOM part list for Retrofit Detector models and BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF BOM record identifying assemblies, ERP codes, parts, specifications, suppliers, quantities, costs, and remarks for listed detector models and accessories.
keyPoints: The source lists Retrofit Detector part lists for G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, and G1417FWP.
The detector BOM sections identify Type as CsI Type.
Top-level OQC module assemblies include PSM-200100, PSM-200110, PSM-200120, PSM-200130, PSM-100100, PSM-100110, PSM-100120, and PSM-100130.
The BOM includes required accessory sections with labels, packing, console/dongle key, battery, VE Gender, cable, and VE adaptor items.
An additional BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy part list covers a VE Gender Cable, 7.0meter configuration.

evidence.claim: The source is a BLUE BOM Rev.0 history file dated 2025.10.21 in the source path.
The repeated form/version marker is 704-9 (REV.00).
The G1717CW part list is classified as Retrofit Detector and identifies Type as CsI Type.
evidence.evidenceText: 분류,Retrofit Detector ,,,,,,( G1717CW ) Part List ... 품명,G1717CW ... Type,CsI Type

evidence.claim: G1717CW uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-200100.
G1717FW uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-200110.
G1717CWP uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-200120.
G1717FWP uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-200130.
G1417CW uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-100100.
G1417FW uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-100110.
G1417CWP uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-100120.
G1417FWP uses top-level OQC module assembly PSM-100130.
The BOM includes CsI 340um and CsI 500um configurations.
The BLUE_BATTERY_ASSY specification is 351P, 11.5V 3,500mAh.
The BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy section covers a VE Gender Cable, 7.0meter configuration.
evidence.evidenceText: 품명,BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy ... VE Gender Cable, 7.0meter

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
No explicit regulatory standards are identified; cable labels such as CAT7 and UL2464 appear as part specifications rather than document-level standards.
Document date is ambiguous: the filename contains 2025.10.21, detector approval rows show 2025-7-3, and the BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy section shows 2025-7-15.
Some accessory section headings appear reused across models, for example G1717CW_Accessory appears under G1717FW/G1717CWP/G1717FWP sections and G1417CW_Accessory appears under G1417CWP.
The source is a preprocessed spreadsheet-like BOM with repeated headers and sparse cells; some supplier or remark fields are blank or marked ANY/market item.
